LAW AND MOTION 302, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING CONTINUED FROM DEC-20-2012 TO LAW AND MOTION AT FEB-27-2013, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AT THE CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH MODIFICATION AS FOLLOWS: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: ORDER FOR SALE OF DWELLING IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 27, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. THIS COURT BELIEVES THAT RESPONDENT'S MOTION TO WITHDRAW THE WRIT AND MS. THOMAS' MOTION REGARDING HER INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY (CURRENTLY SET IN SAN MATEO) OUGHT TO BE RESOLVED BEFORE ORDERING A SALE. PETITIONER TO PROVIDE AN APPRAISAL OF THE PROPERTY BY JANUARY 18, 2013. BOTH PARTIES TO LODGE SUPPLEMENTAL BRIEFS BY FEBRUARY 4, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

STEVEN BOVARNICK, ESQ., 415.957.1800, FOR RESPONDENTS PATRICK AINSWORTH AND MARY THOMAS.

RULING: matter discussed. Defendant's motion to continue today's hearing is granted. Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling is continued to November 12, 2013 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Written status conference to be filed 3 days before hearing. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

ATTY. STEVEN H. BOVARNICH OF THE LELAND, PARACHINI & MELNICH LLP, TEL. NO. 957-1800 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling is continued to August 21, 2013 for further status report whether the listing agreement was signed by the broker and Ms. Thomas . The court is inclined to enter the proposed order regarding the sale of property submitted by petitioner at that time. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Continued To Aug-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302

STEVEN BOVARNICK, ESQ., 415.957.1800, FOR RESPONDENT PATRICK AINSWORTH.

RULING: MATTER DISCUSSED. THE COURT VACATES TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUES Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling TO AUGUST 19, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302. COUNSEL IS ORDERED TO SUBMIT A STATUS REPORT TO THE COURT BY AUGUST 15, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR#7489.

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause hearing Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling is continued to July 31, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 pending disposition of the San Mateo action. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Continued To May-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling - The Court continues this matter to May 30, 2013, pending determination of respondent's motion to withdraw the writ and Ms. Thomas' motion regarding her interest in the property. Petitioner is to provide an appraisal of the property by May 20, 2013. Both parties are to file supplemental briefs by May 20, 2013 apprising the Court of the status of the matter. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 = (302/MJM)

Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Continued To Feb-27-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
David M. McKim, Esq. of the Law Offices of David M. McKim, Tel. 707.545.7123, for petitioner, via court call;
Steven H. Bovarnick, Esq. of Leland Parachini Steinberg Matzger & Melnick LLP, Tel. 415.957.1800, for respondent.

The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the court adopted its tentative ruling with modification as follows: Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling is continued to February 27, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. This Court believes that respondent's motion to withdraw the writ and Ms. Thomas' motion regarding her interest in the property (currently set in San Mateo) ought to be resolved before ordering a sale. Petitioner to provide an appraisal of the property by January 18, 2013. Both parties to lodge supplemental briefs by February 4, 2013. Order signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976.

Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Oct-29-2012 Continued To Dec-20-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling is continued to December 20, 2012 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Respondents shall file a supplemental brief regarding the San Mateo proceedings by December 7, 2012 and petitioner shall file a supplemental response by December 14, 2012. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Continued To Oct-29-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David M. McKim, Esq. of the L/O of David McKim, Tel. 707.545.7123, for Petitioner;
Steven Bovarnick, Esq. of Leland Parachini etc., Tel. 415.957.1800, for Respondents;
Katherine D. Fones, Esq. of Bley & Bley, Tel. 415.982.7311, for Respondent Patrick Ainsworth;
Michelle L. Harris, Esq. of Law Offices of Steven Stoltz (no card).

The matter was argued. After hearing, Order To Show Cause Re: Order For Sale Of Dwelling was taken under submission. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR # 7077

(AFTER HEARING, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH MODIFICATIONS. THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 29, 2012 AT 9:30 AM. SEE SIGNED ORDER FOR DETAILS OF THE RULING. PETITIONER TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE ORDER.)
